targets.rawSql:
WITH NgTime AS (
    SELECT
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) AS dt,
        MAX(CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER([Judgement [S]]]))) = 'X'
                 THEN TRY_CONVERT(TIME, [Production Time]) END) AS ng_time
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE [Part Type] = 'Injection'
      AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
      AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]])
),
daily_data AS (
    SELECT
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) AS dt,
        AVG(TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Room Temp (C)])) AS FLOAT)) AS room_temp,
        AVG(TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Humidiy (%)]))   AS FLOAT)) AS room_humid,
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name])))        AS [Part Name],
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.])))     AS [Material No.],
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.])))           AS [OI No.],
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.])))  AS [Sample Part No.],
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material])))     AS [Lot Material],
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD])))    AS [Condition STD],
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member])))        AS [QC Member]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Part Type] = 'Injection'
        AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Room Temp (C)])) AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Humidiy (%)]))   AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND (
            '${rh_month:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CASE CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
                    WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar'
                    WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr' WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
                    WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug' WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep'
                    WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
               END IN (${rh_month:singlequote})
        )
        AND ('${rh_year:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) IN (${rh_year:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_mold:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))    IN (${rh_mold:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_mc_no:csv}'   = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))     IN (${rh_mc_no:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_part_no:csv}' = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))    IN (${rh_part_no:singlequote}))
    GROUP BY TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]])
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN ng.ng_time IS NOT NULL
        THEN CAST(CAST(d.dt AS DATETIME) + CAST(ng.ng_time AS DATETIME) AS DATETIME)
        ELSE CAST(d.dt AS DATETIME)
    END           AS time,
    d.room_temp,
    d.room_humid,
    d.[Part Name],
    d.[Material No.],
    d.[OI No.],
    d.[Sample Part No.],
    d.[Lot Material],
    d.[Condition STD],
    d.[QC Member]
FROM daily_data AS d
LEFT JOIN NgTime AS ng ON ng.dt = d.dt
ORDER BY time

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) AS dt,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Room Temp (C)])) AS FLOAT) AS temp_val,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Humidiy (%)]))   AS FLOAT) AS humid_val,
        TRY_CONVERT(TIME, [Production Time])              AS prod_time,
        LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER([Judgement [S]]])))             AS judg,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name]))        AS part_name,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.]))     AS material_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.]))           AS oi_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.])) AS sample_part_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))     AS lot_material,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))    AS condition_std,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))        AS qc_member
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Part Type] = 'Injection'
        AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Room Temp (C)])) AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Humidiy (%)]))   AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND (
            '${rh_month:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CASE CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
                    WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar'
                    WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr' WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
                    WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug' WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep'
                    WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
               END IN (${rh_month:singlequote})
        )
        AND ('${rh_year:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) IN (${rh_year:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_mold:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))    IN (${rh_mold:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_mc_no:csv}'   = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))     IN (${rh_mc_no:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_part_no:csv}' = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))    IN (${rh_part_no:singlequote}))
),
ng_only AS (
    SELECT dt, prod_time FROM base WHERE judg = 'X'
)
SELECT
    CAST(
        CAST((SELECT MIN(dt) FROM ng_only) AS DATETIME)
        + CAST((SELECT TOP 1 prod_time FROM ng_only ORDER BY dt ASC, prod_time ASC) AS DATETIME)
    AS DATETIME)                        AS time,
    AVG(temp_val)                       AS avg_temp_line,
    AVG(humid_val)                      AS avg_humid_line,
    STRING_AGG(part_name,      ' / ')   AS [Part Name],
    STRING_AGG(material_no,    ' / ')   AS [Material No],
    STRING_AGG(oi_no,          ' / ')   AS [OI No.],
    STRING_AGG(sample_part_no, ' / ')   AS [Sample Part No.],
    STRING_AGG(lot_material,   ' / ')   AS [Lot Material],
    STRING_AGG(condition_std,  ' / ')   AS [Condition STD],
    STRING_AGG(qc_member,      ' / ')   AS [QC Member]
FROM base

UNION ALL

SELECT
    CAST(
        CAST((SELECT MAX(dt) FROM ng_only) AS DATETIME)
        + CAST((SELECT TOP 1 prod_time FROM ng_only ORDER BY dt DESC, prod_time DESC) AS DATETIME)
    AS DATETIME)                        AS time,
    AVG(temp_val)                       AS avg_temp_line,
    AVG(humid_val)                      AS avg_humid_line,
    STRING_AGG(part_name,      ' / ')   AS [Part Name],
    STRING_AGG(material_no,    ' / ')   AS [Material No],
    STRING_AGG(oi_no,          ' / ')   AS [OI No.],
    STRING_AGG(sample_part_no, ' / ')   AS [Sample Part No.],
    STRING_AGG(lot_material,   ' / ')   AS [Lot Material],
    STRING_AGG(condition_std,  ' / ')   AS [Condition STD],
    STRING_AGG(qc_member,      ' / ')   AS [QC Member]
FROM base

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) AS dt,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Room Temp (C)])) AS FLOAT) AS temp_val,
        TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Humidiy (%)]))   AS FLOAT) AS humid_val,
        TRY_CONVERT(TIME, [Production Time])              AS prod_time,
        LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER([Judgement [S]]])))             AS judg,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name]))        AS part_name,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.]))     AS material_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.]))           AS oi_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.])) AS sample_part_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))     AS lot_material,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))    AS condition_std,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))        AS qc_member
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Part Type] = 'Injection'
        AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Room Temp (C)])) AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Humidiy (%)]))   AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND (
            '${rh_month:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CASE CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
                    WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar'
                    WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr' WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
                    WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug' WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep'
                    WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
               END IN (${rh_month:singlequote})
        )
        AND ('${rh_year:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) IN (${rh_year:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_mold:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))    IN (${rh_mold:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_mc_no:csv}'   = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))     IN (${rh_mc_no:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_part_no:csv}' = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))    IN (${rh_part_no:singlequote}))
),
overall_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(temp_val) AS avg_temp_val, AVG(humid_val) AS avg_humid_val
    FROM base
),
ng_time_by_day AS (
    SELECT dt, MAX(prod_time) AS ng_time
    FROM base WHERE judg = 'X'
    GROUP BY dt
),
all_days AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT dt FROM base
),
day_breakdown AS (
    SELECT
        dt,
        STRING_AGG(part_name,      ' / ') AS part_name,
        STRING_AGG(material_no,    ' / ') AS material_no,
        STRING_AGG(oi_no,          ' / ') AS oi_no,
        STRING_AGG(sample_part_no, ' / ') AS sample_part_no,
        STRING_AGG(lot_material,   ' / ') AS lot_material,
        STRING_AGG(condition_std,  ' / ') AS condition_std,
        STRING_AGG(qc_member,      ' / ') AS qc_member
    FROM base
    GROUP BY dt
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN ng.ng_time IS NOT NULL
        THEN CAST(CAST(d.dt AS DATETIME) + CAST(ng.ng_time AS DATETIME) AS DATETIME)
        ELSE CAST(d.dt AS DATETIME)
    END                    AS time,
    oa.avg_temp_val        AS avg_temp_line,
    oa.avg_humid_val       AS avg_humid_line,
    db.part_name           AS [Part Name],
    db.material_no         AS [Material No],
    db.oi_no               AS [OI No.],
    db.sample_part_no      AS [Sample Part No.],
    db.lot_material        AS [Lot Material],
    db.condition_std       AS [Condition STD],
    db.qc_member           AS [QC Member]
FROM all_days AS d
CROSS JOIN overall_avg AS oa
LEFT JOIN ng_time_by_day AS ng ON ng.dt = d.dt
LEFT JOIN day_breakdown   AS db ON db.dt = d.dt
ORDER BY time

WITH lot_data AS (
    SELECT
        [Identical ID],
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) AS dt,
        AVG(TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Room Temp (C)])) AS FLOAT)) AS avg_temp,
        AVG(TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Humidiy (%)]))   AS FLOAT)) AS avg_humid,
        MAX(CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER([Judgement [S]]]))) = 'X'
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_ng,
        MAX(CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER([Judgement [S]]]))) = 'X'
                 THEN TRY_CONVERT(TIME, [Production Time]) END) AS ng_time,
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name])))       AS part_name,
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.])))    AS material_no,
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.])))          AS oi_no,
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.]))) AS sample_part_no,
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material])))    AS lot_material,
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD])))   AS condition_std,
        MAX(LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member])))       AS qc_member
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Part Type] = 'Injection'
        AND [Production Date [S]]] IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]]) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Room Temp (C)])) AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND TRY_CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Humidiy (%)]))   AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL
        AND (
            '${rh_month:csv}' = 'All'
            OR CASE CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
                    WHEN 1  THEN 'Jan' WHEN 2  THEN 'Feb' WHEN 3  THEN 'Mar'
                    WHEN 4  THEN 'Apr' WHEN 5  THEN 'May' WHEN 6  THEN 'Jun'
                    WHEN 7  THEN 'Jul' WHEN 8  THEN 'Aug' WHEN 9  THEN 'Sep'
                    WHEN 10 THEN 'Oct' WHEN 11 THEN 'Nov' WHEN 12 THEN 'Dec'
               END IN (${rh_month:singlequote})
        )
        AND ('${rh_year:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record])) IN (${rh_year:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_mold:csv}'    = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.]))    IN (${rh_mold:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_mc_no:csv}'   = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))     IN (${rh_mc_no:singlequote}))
        AND ('${rh_part_no:csv}' = 'All' OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.]))    IN (${rh_part_no:singlequote}))
    GROUP BY
        [Identical ID],
        TRY_CONVERT(DATE, [Production Date [S]]])
)
SELECT
    -- ✅ ถ้า ng_time เป็น NULL → ใช้ dt เปล่า
    CASE
        WHEN MAX(ng_time) IS NOT NULL
        THEN CAST(CAST(dt AS DATETIME) + CAST(MAX(ng_time) AS DATETIME) AS DATETIME)
        ELSE CAST(dt AS DATETIME)
    END                               AS time,
    AVG(avg_temp)                     AS ng_temp_marker,
    AVG(avg_humid)                    AS ng_humid_marker,
    STRING_AGG(part_name,      ' / ') AS [Part Name],
    STRING_AGG(material_no,    ' / ') AS [Material No],
    STRING_AGG(oi_no,          ' / ') AS [OI No.],
    STRING_AGG(sample_part_no, ' / ') AS [Sample Part No.],
    STRING_AGG(lot_material,   ' / ') AS [Lot Material],
    STRING_AGG(condition_std,  ' / ') AS [Condition STD],
    STRING_AGG(qc_member,      ' / ') AS [QC Member]
FROM lot_data
WHERE has_ng = 1
GROUP BY dt
ORDER BY time

panels.title: ROOM TEMP & HUMIDITY PER MONTHLY AVG

list.definition:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                    -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
list.label: Month
list.name: rh_month
list.query:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))                    -- ✅ __value เป็นชื่อเดือนด้วย
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __value
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT [Month Record]
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
) AS t
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT TRIM([Year Record]) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY value DESC
list.label: Year
list.name: rh_year
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT TRIM([Year Record]) AS value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY value DESC

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) NOT LIKE '0%'
  AND LEN(TRIM([Mold No.])) > 1
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'              -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Mold No.
list.name: rh_mold
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Mold No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) NOT LIKE '0%'
  AND LEN(TRIM([Mold No.])) > 1
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'              -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([M/C No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([M/C No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([M/C No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${rh_mold:singlequote})                -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No. ที่เลือก
ORDER BY __value
list.label: M/C No.
list.name: rh_mc_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([M/C No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([M/C No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([M/C No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${rh_mold:singlequote})                -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No. ที่เลือก
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${rh_mold:singlequote})                -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND TRIM([M/C No.])  IN (${rh_mc_no:singlequote})               -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Part No.
list.name: rh_part_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __text,
    TRIM([Part No.]) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM([Part No.]) <> ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'                                       -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND TRIM([Mold No.]) IN (${rh_mold:singlequote})                -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND TRIM([M/C No.])  IN (${rh_mc_no:singlequote})               -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value

title: ROOM TEMP & HUMIDITY PER MONTHLY AVG
